zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Webber於1604年12月5日出生在英國英格蘭戴文比德福德時，他的父親William Webber37歲，母親Johan Wynslade33歲。他於1626年7月12日與Phillipa Jonson在英國戴文艾可謝特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1644年在他的家鄉享年40歲，埋葬在英國戴文比德福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Webber于1604年12月5日出生在英国英格兰戴文比德福德时，他的父亲William Webber37岁，母亲Johan Wynslade33岁。他于1626年7月12日与Phillipa Jonson在英国戴文艾可謝特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1644年在他的家乡享年40岁，埋葬在英国戴文比德福德。

nameMeanings.name: Webber
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): occupational name for a weaver, from Middle English webber, an agent derivative of Webb .
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weber   ‘weaver’.

variants.name: Webb
meanings: English: occupational name for a weaver, from early Middle English webbe (Old English webba (masculine) or webbe (feminine), probably used of both male and female weavers). This word survived into Middle English long enough to give rise to the surname, but was already obsolescent as an agent noun; hence the secondary forms with the agent suffixes -er and -ster (see Webster , Webber and compare Weaver ).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, cognates of 1, including Weber and Weberman.
History: Richard Webb, a Lowland Scot, was an admitted freeman of Boston in 1632, and in 1635 was one of the first settlers of Hartford, CT.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Webber was born on 5 December 1604, in Bideford, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Webber, was 37 and his mother, Johan Wynslade, was 33. He married Phillipa Jonson on 12 July 1626, in Exeter, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1644, in his hometown, at the age of 40, and was buried in Bideford, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Webber est né le 5 décembre 1604, à Bideford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Webber, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Johan Wynslade, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Phillipa Jonson le 12 juillet 1626, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1644, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Bideford, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Webber am 5. Dezember 1604 in Bideford, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Webber 37 und seine Mutter Johan Wynslade 33. Er hat am 12. Juli 1626 in Exeter, Devon, England Phillipa Jonson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1644 im Alter von 40 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bideford, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Webber è nato il il 5 dicembre 1604 nel Bideford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Webber, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Johan Wynslade, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Phillipa Jonson il 12 luglio 1626, nel Exeter, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1644, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Bideford, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Webberが1604年12月5日にイギリスイギリスデボンビデフォードで生まれた時，父William Webberは37歳，母Johan Wynsladeは33歳であった。1626年7月12日にイギリスデボンエクセターでPhillipa Jonsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1644年に故郷で40歳で死去し，イギリスデボンビデフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Webber(이)가 1604년 12월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 비데퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Webber(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Johan Wynslade(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1626년 7월 12일 영국 데폰 세터에서 Phillipa Jonson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1644년 그의 고향에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 비데퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Webber nasceu em 5 de dezembro de 1604, em Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Webber, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Johan Wynslade, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Phillipa Jonson em 12 de julho de 1626, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1644, em sua cidade natal, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Webber родился 5 декабря 1604 г. в местности бидефорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Webber было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Johan Wynslade, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Phillipa Jonson 12 июля 1626 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1644 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности бидефорд, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Webber nació el 5 de diciembre de 1604, en Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Webber, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Johan Wynslade, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Phillipa Jonson el 12 de julio de 1626, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1644, en su pueblo, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra.
